aids.title: PDCSTDM = ML Process Steps
aids.content: **P**roblem Definition, **D**ata Collection, data **C**leaning/prep, model **S**election, **T**raining, evaluation/**D**eployment, **M**aintenance — Please Do Clean Stuff To Deploy Models
aids.forRemembering: All 7 steps of the ML process in order

aids.title: Metric Match by Problem Type
aids.content: Classification = Accuracy/F1/AUC-ROC. Regression = MSE/RMSE/MAE/R². Clustering = Silhouette/Inertia. Never mix them up!
